title: Boston Dynamics’ New Upgraded ATLAS Just Went BEAST MODE
summary: The video discusses recent advances in humanoid robotics, highlighting Boston Dynamics' upgraded Atlas performing physical manipulation tasks like lifting fridges, Unitree's G1 responding to voice commands, and Gatsby's deployment of robots for residential cleaning. The commentary argues that humanoid robots are transitioning from proof-of-concept demonstrations to practical real-world deployment in factories, warehouses, and homes.
